# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: mySPN         # Unique Id for this spn, it will be used in output references  and also as prefix to the scope below  
  type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments @2018-09-01preview    
  apiVersion: '2018-09-01'    # Specifies version of API, required for resources created using this template             
  properties:  
      roleDefinitionName: "Contributor"                # Name in Azure which represents the permissions. You can find more here https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/role-assignments/role-definitions#roles    
    principalId: "[identityResouce().identity.principalid]"   # Replace with your subscription id or use reference to existing resource     
  scope: "/subscriptions/{deploymentScope()}"        # Scope of the role assignment, it can be '/' for subscrition level , './subscription/.. ' etc     You may want one that matches you requirements and update when needed.   It also supports Managed Identity in case your pipeline has access to get identity info
